response.justification: Candidate has valuable geospatial and GIS expertise directly relevant to routing systems, plus distributed systems and Linux background. However, C++ experience appears dated (from roles 10+ years ago) with recent work heavily focused on web/TypeScript, raising concerns about ability to operate effectively in modern C++ immediately without ramp-up.
strengths: Deep geospatial and mapping domain expertise with shipped GIS platforms and routing applications
Proven experience with distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and low-latency optimizations
Strong ability to learn diverse technical stacks and work across full engineering stack
concerns: C++ experience is dated (LabWindows, robotic arms roles mid-career); no recent modern C++ or systems programming work
Career trajectory over past 5+ years heavily toward web stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) away from systems-level work
No mention of Rust, the acceptable alternative skill; significant ramp-up needed for modern C++/systems work

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and low-latency optimization experience
